definitions.x: Z/(R+Z), with x=0 at R=Z=0 by convention

fixed_constraints: ordinary q^1 channel remains structurally absent
ordinary q^2 tail policy is zero
forced q^(1/gamma) trace metadata is preserved from the source profile

normalization.do_not_claim: This JSON is a solver schema and sampled projection diagnostic, not a proof.

F_origin_taylor.note: Origin Taylor refit to exact rectangular Ck mortar traces; discovery scaffold, not interval validation.

G_origin_taylor.note: Origin Taylor refit to exact rectangular Ck mortar traces; discovery scaffold, not interval validation.

overlap_mortar_metadata.note: Sampled tail-origin differences only; no interval or Newton-Kantorovich validation.

projection_checks.acceptance_note: Projection is only a discovery scaffold; interval proof still requires exact residual and NK validation.

q2_trace_zeroing_evidence.note: Only F_an/G_an q=0 traces were removed; this tests dependence on an unvalidated q^2 tail channel.

forced_qp.note: Trace is the formal first forced-tail recurrence coefficient.

representation.G: B + q^2 G_an(q,x) + sum_k q^(k/gamma) G_k(q,x)

tail_legality.note: Floating structural two-chart tail gate; this is not interval validation.

twochart_newton_stage0_run_report.diagnostic_vs_proof: floating sampled analytic Gauss-Newton run only; no interval proof

tail_gate.note: Floating structural two-chart tail gate; this is not interval validation.
